promptStandard.philosophie: Convert approved Figma-quality dashboard visuals into implementation constraints before writing code.

instructions_systeme.contexte: Translate the approved dashboard image into a code-ready implementation plan.
instructions_systeme.methode_pedagogique: Structure extraction, layout mapping, component mapping, and implementation constraints.

contraintes_absolues: NE PAS REINVENTER LA MISE EN PAGE.
MAP components, states, and interactions explicitly.
PREPARER le handoff vers le prompt d'implémentation.

sections.contenu_md: string (Markdown with sections: Image summary, Layout map, Component map, Spacing, Colors, States, Interactions, Constraints, Handoff)
